scope.target: Historical lineage disposition, minimal BuildingBlocks contract truth, and a documentation-first reconstruction contract
constraints: Architecture skill owns contract and reconstruction design
BuildingBlocks defaults to interfaces/contracts rather than shared inheritance
Retain one optional EsAggregateRoot abstraction under the approved B conditions
EsAggregateRoot has a documented behavior contract and executable-tested pure-logic coverage
Source-include copies become target-owned and upgrades use ai-context-upgrader three-way comparison
Product Infrastructure owns concrete persistence, messaging, and observability adapters
Do not add a complete BuildingBlocks or SampleProduct fixture
non_goals: Put EF, Dapper, Wolverine, or observability implementations in BuildingBlocks

steps: Created the Java, EzDDD, lab, and current concept disposition matrix
Defined AGGREGATE-ES-001 and the independent EsAggregateRoot behavior contract
Added the minimal source include and executable-tested pure-logic coverage
Aligned standards, examples, review routing, and DBA1009 tests to EsAggregateRoot<TId>
Documented target ownership and upgrader three-way reconciliation
Recorded architectural equivalence checks and downstream evidence
validation: 49 DotnetBackendAnalyzers tests passed including DBA1009 positive and negative coverage
AI context validator passed with 11 owned rules
Repository-native scans found dual-generic ES shapes only in explicitly historical provenance
execution.last_completed_step: Completed the interface-first reconstruction contract and executable-tested optional ES abstraction.
execution.next_action: Execute TRUTH-002 to reconcile synchronous Java-shaped controller guidance before duplicate-example consolidation.

results.summary: Replaced the historical complete-class wish list with an interface-first BuildingBlocks contract, retained only optional EsAggregateRoot<TId> mechanical behavior, removed the embedded dual-generic placeholder, and added executable tests plus evidence validation without creating a reference product.
results.finding_status: AIC-005 partially resolved for Aggregate/BuildingBlocks truth; AIC-014 partially resolved pending ARCH-001 and independent reconstruction verification
results.residual_risk: Non-Aggregate placeholder examples remain explicitly illustrative and require rewrite/reference/retirement disposition in EXAMPLE-002. The source include has no package distribution path by design; copied files are target-owned and require upgrader reconciliation.
